# platformSecretsDel

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformSecretsDel

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformSecretsDelMutation(); mutate({ input: { secretName: '<String>', secretNamespace: '<String>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformSecretsDelMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformSecretsDelMutation();
mutate({ input: { secretName: '<String>', secretNamespace: '<String>' } });
```
